scholarships.title: National Scholarship Portal (NSP)
scholarships.eligibility: For students of all categories and states across India. Central Sector Schemes and UGC/AICTE Schemes.

scholarships.title: Prime Minister's Special Scholarship Scheme (PMSSS)
scholarships.eligibility: For students from Jammu & Kashmir and Ladakh pursuing higher education in other parts of India.

scholarships.title: Central Sector Scheme of Scholarship for College and University Students
scholarships.eligibility: National-level merit-based scholarship for students with a family income below ₹8 lakh per annum.

scholarships.title: Merit-cum-Means Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: For minority communities (Muslims, Sikhs, Christians, etc.) across India with family income not exceeding ₹2.5 lakh per annum.

scholarships.title: Post Matric Scholarship for OBC Students (Uttar Pradesh)
scholarships.eligibility: For OBC students who are domiciles of Uttar Pradesh and have passed Class 10.

scholarships.title: E-PASS Scholarship (Andhra Pradesh)
scholarships.eligibility: For students from Andhra Pradesh belonging to SC, ST, BC, EBC, Differently Abled categories. Family income must be low.

scholarships.title: Post-Matric Scholarship Scheme (West Bengal)
scholarships.eligibility: For students of West Bengal who have passed the matriculation or higher secondary examination.

scholarships.title: Mukhyamantri Medhavi Vidyarthi Yojana (Madhya Pradesh)
scholarships.eligibility: For meritorious students of Madhya Pradesh who have secured good marks in Class 12.

scholarships.title: Minority Scholarship (Maharashtra)
scholarships.eligibility: For minority students (Muslim, Christian, Sikh, etc.) who are domiciles of Maharashtra.

scholarships.title: Karnataka State Scholarship Portal
scholarships.eligibility: For students of Karnataka belonging to various categories including SC/ST/OBC.

scholarships.title: Chief Minister's Scholarship Scheme (Tamil Nadu)
scholarships.eligibility: For students from Tamil Nadu based on merit and financial need.

scholarships.title: Bihar Post Matric Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: For students who are domiciles of Bihar belonging to SC, ST, BC, and EBC categories.

scholarships.title: UP Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: For students of Uttar Pradesh from all categories. Family income is a key factor.

scholarships.title: AICTE Pragati Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: National-level scholarship for meritorious girls pursuing technical education.
